operations:
- GET /widgets
  operationId: listWidgets
  domain: widgets
  kind: query
  clientOut: src/api/_generated/listWidgets.api.ts
  hookName: useListWidgetsFetch
  hookOut: src/features/widgets/hooks/useListWidgetsFetch.ts
- GET /widgets/{widgetId}
  operationId: getWidget
  domain: widgets
  kind: query
  clientOut: src/api/_generated/getWidget.api.ts
  hookName: useGetWidgetFetch
  hookOut: src/features/widgets/hooks/useGetWidgetFetch.ts
- POST /widgets/{widgetId}/archive
  operationId: archiveWidget
  domain: widgets
  kind: mutation
  clientOut: src/api/_generated/archiveWidget.api.ts
  hookName: useArchiveWidgetCommand
  hookOut: src/features/widgets/hooks/useArchiveWidgetCommand.ts
